name: profession-ball-arena
description: 斗球球：面向 Meta 小游戏、Android 和 iOS 的 Canvas 2D 小游戏。

scripts.lint:syntax: node --check game-config.js && node --check i18n.js && node --check battle-danmaku.js && node --check legal-config.js && node --check compliance-state.js && node --check services.js && node --check game.js && node --check cosmetics.js && node --check platform.js && node --check scripts/aso-data-insights.mjs && node --check scripts/build-meta.mjs && node --check scripts/build-ops-growth-html-report.mjs && node --check scripts/capture-aso-screenshots.mjs && node --check scripts/capture-youtube-materials.mjs && node --check scripts/google-api-auth.mjs && node --check scripts/youtube-ops-utils.mjs && node --check scripts/youtube-publish-metrics.mjs && node --check scripts/youtube-upload-short.mjs && node --check scripts/ops-growth-loop.mjs && node --check scripts/ga-daily-check.mjs && node --check scripts/ga-release-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-android-keystore.mjs && node --check scripts/simulate-matchups.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-build-artifacts.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-growth-framework.mjs
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint:syntax && npm test && npm run test:matchups && npm run test:artifacts
scripts.test:artifacts: VITE_PLATFORM_TARGET=meta npm run build && node scripts/build-meta.mjs && node scripts/verify-build-artifacts.mjs
scripts.meta:bundle: VITE_PLATFORM_TARGET=meta npm run build && node scripts/build-meta.mjs
scripts.android:debug: npm run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:internal-test: npm run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:gp:bundle: npm run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew :app:bundleRelease
scripts.android:release: npm run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.ios:ipa:unsigned: npm run build && cap sync ios && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -archivePath ios/build/App.xcarchive archive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO && rm -rf release/ios/Payload && mkdir -p release/ios/Payload && cp -R ios/build/App.xcarchive/Products/Applications/App.app release/ios/Payload/ && cd release/ios && /usr/bin/ditto -c -k --sequesterRsrc --keepParent Payload profession-ball-arena-unsigned.ipa
scripts.mobile:release: npm run android:release && npm run ios:ipa:unsigned
scripts.build:all: npm run build && node scripts/build-meta.mjs && cap sync
